FileProcessor deployment bundle: OUT-ROLLS-SSW_Prod-MFTA01192
Outbound CSV → XML (production, MFTA01192)

Flows in config/flows.yaml: rolls_outbound
Shared input_dir: E:\FTP\AMFT\OUT\MFTA01192\IN

Reference flows.yaml: scripts/deployment-examples/OUT-ROLLS-SSW_Prod-MFTA01192/flows.yaml

Install: see INSTALL.md and WINDOWS_SERVICE_GUIDE.md
Run: python -m file_processor.cli run-daemon-mode config/flows.yaml -v
